title: Alive
description:
Alive brings villagers to life through AI conversations, create unique world and character personas in game using Books and Quills. 

Powered by baarilliant.ai's Gaming Gateway - no API keys or signup required, with a free tier available.
body:
# Alive Mod for Minecraft

Alive brings villagers to life through AI conversations and enhances both the utility and narrative depth of the game. Whether you need practical advice on crafting and gameplay mechanics or wish to weave intricate lore and RPG-style interactions, Alive Mod brings your world to life.

Initiate conversations with villagers by Shift + left-clicking on them and saying hi. Get answers on crafting, in-game mechanics, and more.

The villager will follow you whilst in conversation. When you're done talking just say goodbye to finish the chat.


Download the mod and if you would like to add default traits download the datapack (add this to your world datapacks folder) [alive\_datapack.zip](https://downgit.github.io/#/home?url=https://github.com/Baarilliant-ai/alive-datapack/blob/main/alive_datapack.zip)

[Read the Docs](https://baarilliant-ai.github.io/alive-mod/)

## Villager Traits

Every villager has unique traits based on their profession! Farmers, Librarians, Clerics, and others each have distinct:

- Personalities
- Backstories
- Goals
- Fears
- Quirks
- And much more!

All these traits are now fully customizable through data packs, or disabled in the config.

## Data Packs

Download the default datapack (add this to your world datapacks folder)
[alive_datapack.zip](https://downgit.github.io/#/home?url=https://github.com/Baarilliant-ai/alive-datapack/blob/main/alive_datapack.zip)

Our data pack system makes it easy to personalize your World or Mod Pack, you can easily modify:

- Villager traits for each profession
- The pool of villager names
- World instructions for all entities
- Information about various mods

Check out our documentation to learn how to create your own data packs! YOu can also use a Name Tag along with a Book and Quill to create characters in game.

## Important Information

Alive Mod free version is only aware of in-game features, lore, and capabilities and is unable to answer or act out real world events or facts. Anyone can use Alive free version so strict guardrails are active, to remove these or for more complex solutions or to integrate AI into your mod without managing API keys, safeguards, and anti-abuse measures, contact us at alive@baarilliant.ai.

**Note**  
Your Minecraft UUID is sent to [baarilliant.ai](https://baarilliant.ai) used only for safety and to prevent abuse.

AI can make mistakes, always check the facts.

Join the discord! [https://discord.gg/7KVqSQ3XXK](https://discord.gg/7KVqSQ3XXK)

Powered by [baarilliant.ai](https://baarilliant.ai) Gaming Gateway - no API keys or signup required, with a free tier available.

Alive may not work in some countries or regions, due to restrictions from AI providers [Supported Countries](https://help.openai.com/en/articles/5347006-openai-api-supported-countries-and-territories).
